task: next-normalization-inputs: minimum public data package for trading-suite normalization
note: Budget target was 9 commands; achieved in 6 by batching all fetches into one script and all processing into one script

outputs.gains/normalization.txt: manifest with leverage, fees, all 452 pairs by category
outputs.drift/normalization.txt: manifest with leverage ranges, fees, execution contract
outputs.parcl/normalization.json: 32 real estate markets + exchange settings + margin config
outputs.parcl/normalization.txt: manifest with margin ratios, fees, all markets
outputs.polymarket/markets-sample.json: raw market sample (5 markets, full schema)
outputs.polymarket/events-sample.json: raw event sample (5 events, full schema)
outputs.polymarket/normalization.txt: manifest with CLOB fields, availability semantics, execution contract

commands.desc: Fetch all 4 providers (gains trading-variables, drift stats/markets, parcl app+exchange+market-ids+market-examples x2, poly markets-sample+events-sample) — 9 curl calls in one script
Process all providers: generate paired normalization.json + normalization.txt per provider
